content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM for autonomous agents) should be integrated into state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems to prioritize storing uncertain, high-information unlabeled experiences instead of just memorizing frequent or reward-aligned interactions. This creates a self-reinforcing memory loop where the agent’s curiosity grows its memory capacity for novel learning, which in turn fuels more targeted curiosity-driven exploration.
